news.title: Ye rumored to be working on a new album in Tokyo
news.content: Multiple insiders claim Ye has been recording experimental sounds in Tokyo studios, blending electronic and gospel influences.

news.title: Yeezy archive drops spike again in resale markets
news.content: Prices for early Yeezy Season pieces have surged by 34% this week as collectors rush to secure rare items.

news.title: DONDA-era visuals return to social media trends
news.content: Clips from the DONDA listening events are going viral again, with fans calling it Ye’s most cinematic era.

news.title: Unreleased Ye snippets surface in underground forums
news.content: Short audio snippets allegedly tied to Yandhi-era sessions have appeared on private fan forums.
